reviews.review_description: I ran into a bug on the first level. Tried a different scenario and ran into another bug where we wasted around one hour in each bug trying to figure it out. Now I can’t get a refund. I paid $40 for one hours of play and one hour of frustration. What a total pile of crap.

I just finished all chapters. 
Please 🙏 make more rooms.

Very disappointed, I can not finish the game as when you find the name then key in 5756 there is no reset, I have done everything you can think of, even deleted the game and reinstalled it, but where the reset button is it’s just a piece of wood, 
Any help much appreciated, then I could write a different review
Kindly regards jan steer

Three friends and myself have started playing this game in the past 2 days.  We love the game itself for the puzzles and adventure but hate the fact that we are all the same character, a man (we are all women in reality).
We have tried everything to find a way to customize our character but have been unable to. This problem has interfered a bit with enjoying the game since we can’t tell each other apart.  
I’ve tried using Facebook to ask the creators for help. That has not worked and I don’t expect it will here. Would be nice if the creators would care enough to read these comments and help  .

I love this game. I have played 3 chapters and I don’t want it to end!  There need to be more chapters available to purchase. This is great to play with others. Please make more chapters available/stories!
My daughter and I just beat all 9 levels and we had a blast! I started to give it 4 stars because we couldn’t change our avatar, and we thought it would be our meta avatars. lol.

reviews.review_title: A ton of fun to play with a friend(s)
reviews.review_description: Honestly mimics the feeling of a real escape room really well, just a lot cheaper obviously. Wish there were DLC packs for more rooms but love this game. Maybe the best co-op or multiplayer game on Quest

I've only played the first chapter so far but I had a blast! Played it co-op with my son and it was so much fun! For those wondering (I've read otherwise in other review) one purchase does allow you to play with 2 headsets if the main account (the account used to buy the game) is on both headsets. Love how the devs thought out the lobby system and the chapters. I really hope they'll make dlcs with other rooms in the future.

We just bought this couple days ago & we already played 5 out of 9 tapes.   I am going to sad once we finished the puzzles🤣😢🥺

When new puzzles coming in??  Is there anymore coming in the future????

No notes, just a truly great escape room experience. The final room of the deep sea one is rather difficult, but overall each room and it's puzzles are well thought out, often challenging, and mostly organized to hint at the next steps. Perfection.
There are no buttons on some of the puzzles for the Egyptian one so I can’t play it. I have a meta quest 3. Please fix so I can play. I love this game

I found the final (Nautilus) episode to be very beautiful. A few of the puzzles were particularly challenging, but in each of those cases I ultimately realized that I had been ignoring in-clear-sight clues. 

The controls were obvious/natural, and the ability to play the game one chapter at a time was very convenient.

But, I occasionally wished that I could make notes and set post-its on particular items or spots :-)
but its not quite IEYTD

Played this with my 13 year old daughter whilst I have been away from home for a while. We did 1 level per night and really enjoyed the story lines and gameplay,  one the best VR games we've enjoyed together, I miss it already!

My wife and I played this game together! Its a good game with some quite challenging puzzles, and also a few collectibles to find, and some surprises! 
I hope the devs are hard at work on a sequel or some dlc rooms for us to explore that I would happily buy.

I was really looking forward to this app and I purchased it and also gifted it to my sister and we both feel like we won’t be going back in. This is a very difficult game to do in sitting mode. It’s very difficult to reach anything and is basic with any clues given. as per the title very disappointed. ￼
We love this game!!

It was gifted to me and I played a little alone but quickly realised it would be way more fun for two so I gifted it right back…sooo fun!  I really hope they make another edition SOON!
A few minor glitches but overall fairly smooth even given the distance between our homes.  Cheers! Keep it up!

We love this game ... We need more multiplayer games just like this.
Please add new multiplayer games.
I love it, but there are no subtitles. Please add it. I noticed a skull mouth move and phone too

I own two headsets, quest 3 and quest 3s. On the 3s I setup a second account for my girlfriend to use. I purchased this game on the quest 3. On the 3s I have app sharing enabled so she can access what I've purchased. The day I purchased this game, we were both able to play just fine, with me hosting the game and her joining it. Now when I try to host a game, I get a message on the screen telling me I need to purchase the game for the other headset as well. Am I supposed to do something else to get it to work? Why did it work previously? I honestly would not have purchased this game if I knew I had to buy it twice to play it local with another person. I'm not even sure how I would purchase it on the second headset since they're both on my primary account. Help?
This game is very fun with friends!  Future content with a "Walkabout DLC" model would be nice!

I love everything about this game, I really appreciate how it’s not horror genre, I HATE horror games and horror escape rooms. This is something different, so I really appreciate that. 

Are you guys coming out with an expansion pack?

My only suggestion would be a height adjustment, particularly for sitting.

I am loving the concept of this game, but some things are missing. Like in asylum chapter 1, the monitor is supposed to flash through 4 pictures that correlate to the wall collage, but it’s not. And in Pyramid chapter 1, the buttons are missing from the 2 machines and so I can’t solve the puzzles. I have tried uninstalling and reinstalling and I don’t know what else to do. Devs, please help!

The escape rooms and puzzles are fun but I've run into game breaking bugs in all of the missions. These bugs made some of the puzzles unsolvable or completely unable to finish the mission. 

The radio in the first level of the pyramid didnt work, the video that was supposed to be playing on the TV in the first level of the asylum was not present, and the pink laser in the nemo level was not able to be moved into place. 

I thought I was having trouble figuring out the puzzles only to find out later that there were bugs making it impossible to proceed.

These bugs  have made an otherwise fun game into a frustrating experience.

Also there is supposed to be avatar customization in the game but if you choose a premade avatar when you first play, there is no way to access the avatar editor so you are stuck with whichever premade character you choose.

3 of us have been playing this together and enjoying it. I'm impressed how well it works together with 3 of us playing from different locations. Graphics are quite good. The puzzles are good. Not too hard. I would like to see more rooms added on. Perhaps an expansion pack? But plenty of content with the original 3 rooms (9 really, 3 chapters in each "room").

This is an amazing game. Escape rooms should all be for multiplayers (so strange that most in VR aren’t); the devs know this, and have created fun, challenging puzzles with excellent graphics and sounds. 
We have had a couple glitches in which a puzzle simply didn’t behave (missing pieces one time, and another when a control wheel didn’t work)…we had to exit and re-do the room. But, I’d still give it 10 stars. PLEASE…we hope you are making additional rooms…soon!
This is a very good game “well done”. Question -  Once finished can you reset and start over again
I really enjoyed solving the puzzles in this game. I hope the devs create more adventures and offer them as dlc. I would be first in line.

This is a wonderful escape room game that leaves you feeling amazed when you finish a room. Just hard enough so you're scratching your head occasionally and not too easy so it gets boring. Wonderful graphics, excellent 2-person puzzles so lots of teamwork. I haven't played in solo mode yet but am looking forward to it. More please!
I love this game!  So nice to have a fun multiplayer game that’s not a flipping shooter game!  Pleeeeease do like walk about mini golf does and keep adding rooms, I’ll buy them all!

reviews.review_title: My dad and I loved this game
reviews.review_description: I played this game with my dad and we both loved this game so much!! I get really awkward talking with my dad sometimes, but we both had a really good time solving puzzles together as a team. He is in Korea and I am in the U.S, but it felt like he was right next to me. I wish there was more levels, we solved all in few days and was sad it was over. I would 100% purchase if more puzzles come out. I also loved how there is no jump scare ghost kind of things. I know there are some escapes room themes out there which can be really scary and my dad and I was trying to avoid those. This game was just perfect amount of surprises at a comfortable level!

reviews.review_title: Worth the money. Having a blast.
reviews.review_description: Ok, so I really like this game. It gets you thinking. You get almost zero help as well, so you need to think outside the box sometimes. Just a quick note, though.  I think I found a bug in the laser puzzle in Nemo.  None of the rings on the laser projectors will move the purple laser up. Only one moves it down, and now it's stuck. Turning the wheel in reverse does nothing. I'll keep trying things, but outside of abandoning the room and starting over, is there any way to reset the puzzle?

reviews.review_title: Loved this one!! Multiplayer is the best
reviews.review_description: I sure hope you guys make more of these.  I'm itching to do more of them.  The way that you have the puzzles adapt to the number of players is awesome!!  Each player has their own experience and you depend on each other to get through it.  Super fun!   I need more!! :)

My daughter is away at college and occasionally we play on the oculus together to feel closer.  Usually walkabout, catan, or demeo.  This is a great diversion from those games and  another great way for us to spend some quality low stress time together.  I give this a thumbs up for interactivity, feeling of presence, and the puzzles are just right so far.  

Also real escape rooms are expensive  and this is more or less the same feel with the magic of special effects.  I spent less than $20 per person versus a lot more in the real world.

Hope there are more rooms eventually.
Was very sad to find out you can not save progress

Such a good way to spend time with friends and family. So far there's no comfort rating so I'll say here that it's very comfortable. I usually feel sick with smooth motion, but I'm this game I feel fine and I'm using the smooth as much as the teleport option. The puzzles are fun, not overly challenging so it doesn't frustrate.
I wholly recommend this game for some good fun.

We loved this game. It loaded and ran flawlessly. Puzzles were challenging but also great fun. Would definitely recommend it to anyone that enjoys puzzle type games. The only change I would ask for is the ability to save progress within rooms (currently unless you finish a room, your progress is not saved).

reviews.review_title: The best of escape room game
reviews.review_description: The best of cooperative escape room games

EXACTLY what we have wanted!  The devs and creative team got this one right!  We are playing the multiplayer version and are only 1 chapter in and we are hooked. IRL escape room enthusiasts approved!  Please make many many more. We will buy every set you build. If we could ask for 1 thing, it would be the ability to save our progress for resuming later.  Thank you so much - we are having a blast!
Amazing recommend for a problem solving fun game do try

reviews.review_title: Comes with a lot of glitches
reviews.review_description: 4 family members all purchased, so we can play together. We had to restart some chapters a few times because items we needed were missing. Like the broom in the asylum was there, and then it was gone before we could use it. The 2 red lights at the door wouldn't change to green. In 3rd chapter, we did the right sequence, but podium didn't rise. In Pyramid chapter 2, one of the puzzle pieces was missing. We had to keep restarting because of glitches that we didn't realize were glitches; we just thought we were missing something. Overall, it's a great escape room game, but frustrating to say the least.
Me and hubby played and really enjoyed it! Please release some more levels ☺️🙏

reviews.review_title: Super fun to play with spouse or friend
reviews.review_description: Something a little more casual but still super fun and engaging for everyone. Runs can glitch out sometimes but it can be overcome.

Love that this offers as a co-op!  My bf and I played together last night and the puzzles are challenging but not so much that you can’t solve them.  I love how in the group version the tasks are oriented to have everyone involved.  I’ve played solo and group in the game and it’s a different experience.  I wish more games like this would come out!  Great job!

reviews.review_title: Really loved it but cant Play anymore
reviews.review_description: I dont have access to multiplayer anymore.... Only solo . It keeps saying no wireless connection. I've tried reaching out to correct to bug I get but Never got a reply

reviews.review_title: Avatars don't work and developers left.
reviews.review_description: This is a fun game, but the developers abandoned the game so there's no support at all and the avatars don't work anymore. It's such a shame because the game was fun.
Little content for the price, little to no clues for play and no way to save progress. No future updates.

Developers, you did a fantastic job on this! Our family enjoyed The Room VR years ago but this game allowed us to get in the room together and enjoy hours of fun together. We played with 4 players, if required us to work together and did not disappoint. I am in no way affiliated with company and I 100% recommend it to everyone that enjoys escape rooms! My only suggestion is to do add on games with 3 chapters each like the current setup. We would gladly pay $5.00 for those
How can I report a bug? This is a cool game but it isn’t loading properly in multiplayer mode.
When we both join the same room, we can't see each other. Wanted to play this as a two player.

reviews.review_title: Get this game to the front page
reviews.review_description:
How is this buried in App Lab?? $20 for hours of playtime. An IRL escape room is $20 for one room for one hour, this is a total steal.

The room themes are really neat. The puzzles are so well designed that playing in a duo we struggled with a puzzle maybe 2-3 times but eventually were able to sort it out. Never hit a true dead end.

I really hope the devs add more content, because the design of this is what I want in a social game with friends, and they know how to make the perfect difficulty of puzzles - and none were repetitive.

This is easily better than real escape rooms, and I live in Orlando, FL where they are everywhere. Better, cheaper, AND more convenient!

Tons of fun with all 4 people, and still great with fewer or even solo. Sometimes the physical/mechanical interactions took us a moment to figure out, but we never got stuck or had to use hints, so the progression went smoothly.

This is such a great game and I really had high hopes for it but I feel like it's been abandoned. 
Desperately waiting for new rooms or levels.

Would be 5 star if there was.

reviews.review_title: too many pirated users play online
reviews.review_description:
Hi, I am Raymond Ng, from Hong Kong.

I know that too many pirated users can also play online, which is really unfair.  I have two  Q3 and bought 2 copies for this game,
The price of the game is not affordable;
It is extremely unfair. 

The developers need to review this serious situation. Why can pirated users also play online?

please follow and resolve.

reviews.review_title: Meet the Rooms of your Realities!
reviews.review_description:
Personally, I think escape room is the best game genre for VR. 
In contrast, it was always disappointing that escape room games on the Meta store were not as common as puzzle and adventure games. 
Then I heard about the release of ROR, and after playing the game in multiplayer mode with 4 friends, I fell in love with the game. 

So far, two scenarios with three chapters have been released, and one more will be added soon. 
Each scenario has a completely different content, stage, and atmosphere. 
I think it took about 2 hours to solve one scenario. 
What a fun and ecstatic 2 hours it was...

Since then, I've been recommending this game to my friends every chance I get.
I recommend that you who are reading this review buy it right away. 
Don't worry if you don't have any friends to hang out with right now. 
There is also a solo mode where you can enjoy alone!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your extensive feedback - we really appreciate it. Stay tuned for the upcoming updates :)

reviews.review_title: Forsaken asylum incredible and an issue
reviews.review_description:
I just finished this new release with 3 friends (the forsaken asylum) and it is spectacular, my congratulations to the developers. I just wanted to know if the third chapter is over so soon or if we did something wrong 😅. 

On the other hand, I wanted to report that one of my friends the game tells him that it doesn't detect the avatar and gives him to choose a predefined one. The problem of using a predefined character is, on the one hand, my friend also sees the rest of his friends with predefined avatars and also these characters do not move their hands or make gestures so the game loses playability. On the other hand, we can't see how our friend moves either, although we can see the rest of them normally and with their avatar. I hope you can help me with this problem. 


Cheers and looking forward to Nemo's delivery!

developer_response.body: Hi there - thanks a lot for your honest and extensive feedback. When it comes to the issue you've mentioned, we will investigate and see what can be done about that. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_title: Love this! So awesome it is multiplayer!
reviews.review_description:
I have always wanted to play escape rooms in vr but have never tried because i am a huge scaredy cat (even atmospheric sounds scare me when i am alone) .. Finally, a multiplayer one appears!! No second thoughts and grabbed it! Also had 3 of my friends buy it to play together.. 😅 0 regrets, we had lots of fun and laughter.. A little sad only because it ended too soon, there were 4 of us so it took us like 2hrs to complete this.. BUT we are now eagerly waiting for next update..

My husband and daughter had an awesome time playing too! Very family friendly and great for bonding.. 🥰 

I hope newer release will have either a lot more chapters or make each one longer..
sadly too short and a bit more complex would be awesome

developer_response.body: Hi there, thanks for your feedback! We will see what can be done in the future :)

reviews.review_description: Best experience of you play it with a friend.
